meta.title: Rhythmic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Mexico | Zaltyko - FMGM
meta.description: Manage your federated rhythmic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, categories, levels 1-10, 5 apparatus and FMGM-CONADE licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated rhythmic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over FMGM-CONADE athletes, categories, levels 1-10, 5 apparatus and licenses. Olimpiada Nacional and Circuito Nacional.

painPoints.generic: Managing the dual FMGM + CONADE system takes time you could spend training. Gymnastic equipment for 5 apparatus is expensive and hard to track.
painPoints.specific: Renewing FMGM licenses and CONADE registration, managing equipment (ropes, hoops, balls, clubs, ribbons), tracking levels 1-10 and required exercises.
